repo_prior_art.cite: none; ThmSmith/doc/API.md §3 says ExactID and PartialID catalogues are empty at seed time

published_prior_art.cite: GabrielSachsSjolander2023 gives sharp two-binary-mediator bounds; GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 gives proxy partial identification, but neither packages this mixed mediator-coupling/proxy envelope LP

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue ExactID/PartialID multi-mediator proxy-bound proposal

published_prior_art.cite: closest are GabrielSachsSjolander2023, GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023, DukesShpitserTchetgen2023, and GhassamiYangShpitserTchetgen2025; none covers bounded proxy-confounding plus marginal-only two-mediator coupling with a strictly wider rectangular relaxation

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue ExactID/PartialID multi-mediator no-interaction reduction

published_prior_art.cite: VanderWeeleVansteelandt2014 and XiaChan2022 contain the relevant multiple-mediator additivity/no-interaction background; this theorem is a proposal-specific sanity reduction

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a rational 2x2 toy LP witness candidate for Conjecture 1, even if not fully proved, with explicit p10, p20, q-band, G, b, ell, and u values.
State a minimality variant of Conjecture 1: whether one proxy equation can create the interior endpoint, or whether at least two shared bridge equations are necessary.
Add HanLuoZhangGu2026 to the named checklist as the closest non-proxy partial-confounder comparator, since it is already cited in §5 and helps delimit the proxy-specific contribution.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0/1 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship and require an explicit finite LP witness before any sharpness promotion.
